languages.text: {n}Абеляр с крайне удивленным видом качает головой.{/n} "Все это выглядит, как грандиозный обман, Лорд-капитан. В те времена Даргонус был взят в осаду пиратским кланом Сенай, и ваш славный предок сумел отбить их дерзкие атаки. Мне не встречалось ни единого упоминания о его конфликте с Инквизицией".

{n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."
languages.original_text: {n}Абеляр с крайне удивленным видом качает головой.{/n} "Все это выглядит, как грандиозный обман, Лорд-капитан. В те времена Даргонус был взят в осаду пиратским кланом Сенай, и ваш славный предок сумел отбить их дерзкие атаки. Мне не встречалось ни единого упоминания о его конфликте с Инквизицией".

In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

{n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

languages.text: {n}阿贝拉德一脸震惊地摇了摇头。{/n}“这看起来就像个精心编织的骗局，舰长大人。您那位显赫的先祖在世时，达戈努斯曾遭塞内海盗氏族围攻，而他成功击退了他们肆无忌惮的进攻。我从没看到过任何王朝与审判庭发生冲突的记载。”
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿贝拉德一脸震惊地摇了摇头。{/n}“这看起来就像个精心编织的骗局，舰长大人。您那位显赫的先祖在世时，达戈努斯曾遭塞内海盗氏族围攻，而他成功击退了他们肆无忌惮的进攻。我从没看到过任何王朝与审判庭发生冲突的记载。”

languages.text: {n}Abélard secoue la tête d'un air abasourdi.{/n} « Cette histoire m'a tout l'air d'un vaste canular, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Au temps de votre glorieux ancêtre, Dargonus a été assiégée par le clan pirate de Saynay, dont il a réussi à repousser les assauts éhontés, mais jamais je n'ai entendu parler d'un conflit avec l'Inquisition. »
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abélard secoue la tête d'un air abasourdi.{/n} « Cette histoire m'a tout l'air d'un vaste canular, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Au temps de votre glorieux ancêtre, Dargonus a été assiégée par le clan pirate de Saynay, dont il a réussi à repousser les assauts éhontés, mais jamais je n'ai entendu parler d'un conflit avec l'Inquisition. »

languages.text: {n}Abelard, eksiksiz bir şaşkınlıkla başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Hepsi büyük bir aldatmaca gibi görünüyor Lord Kaptan. Şanlı atanızın zamanında Dargonus, Saynay korsan klanı tarafından kuşatılmıştı. Dargonus da onların küstah saldırılarını püskürtmeyi başarmıştı. Engizisyon ile herhangi bir çatışmadan bahsedildiğine hiç rastlamadım."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard, eksiksiz bir şaşkınlıkla başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Hepsi büyük bir aldatmaca gibi görünüyor Lord Kaptan. Şanlı atanızın zamanında Dargonus, Saynay korsan klanı tarafından kuşatılmıştı. Dargonus da onların küstah saldırılarını püskürtmeyi başarmıştı. Engizisyon ile herhangi bir çatışmadan bahsedildiğine hiç rastlamadım."

languages.text: {n}Abelard niega con la cabeza con gesto de asombro.{/n} «Esto parece una grandiosa farsa, Lord Capitán. En tiempos de su glorioso antepasado, Dargonus fue asediado por el clan de piratas Saynay, pero logró rechazar sus osados ataques. Nunca he visto mención alguna de un conflicto con la Inquisición».
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard niega con la cabeza con gesto de asombro.{/n} «Esto parece una grandiosa farsa, Lord Capitán. En tiempos de su glorioso antepasado, Dargonus fue asediado por el clan de piratas Saynay, pero logró rechazar sus osados ataques. Nunca he visto mención alguna de un conflicto con la Inquisición».

languages.text: {n}Abelard schüttelt erstaunt den Kopf.{/n} "Das sieht alles nach einem grandiosen Schwindel aus, Lord Captain. Zu Zeiten Eures ruhmreichen Ahnherren wurde Dargonus vom Piratenclan der Saynay belagert und er konnte ihre wilden Angriffe zurückschlagen. Ich habe noch nie von einem Konflikt mit der Inquisition gehört."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard schüttelt erstaunt den Kopf.{/n} "Das sieht alles nach einem grandiosen Schwindel aus, Lord Captain. Zu Zeiten Eures ruhmreichen Ahnherren wurde Dargonus vom Piratenclan der Saynay belagert und er konnte ihre wilden Angriffe zurückschlagen. Ich habe noch nie von einem Konflikt mit der Inquisition gehört."

languages.text: {n}アベラードは驚愕の表情で首を横に振る。{/n}「これは大々的な詐欺のようだ、ロード・キャプテン様。貴方の祖先であるドラゴヌスが、栄光を誇る時代、サイナイ海賊団に包囲された時、彼らは大胆な攻撃を仕掛けたが、ドラゴヌスはそれを撃退した。私は、インキジシオンとの戦いの記述を見たことがない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}アベラードは驚愕の表情で首を横に振る。{/n}「これは大々的な詐欺のようだ、ロード・キャプテン様。貴方の祖先であるドラゴヌスが、栄光を誇る時代、サイナイ海賊団に包囲された時、彼らは大胆な攻撃を仕掛けたが、ドラゴヌスはそれを撃退した。私は、インキジシオンとの戦いの記述を見たことがない。」
